settings.heading:
Made to
be kept
settings.lead: A Tokyo studio designing against the season — honest materials, restrained construction, numbered releases.

settings.title: A studio, not a brand
settings.body: ARCHIVES began in a converted printworks in Shibuya in 2019 — three people, two sewing machines, and a refusal to work to a seasonal calendar.

settings.title: Sourced, not sold to us
settings.body: We visit every mill and tannery in person. Fabric is chosen for how it ages, not how it photographs on a lookbook day.

settings.title: Built to be repaired
settings.body: Every piece ships with a repair guide and a lifetime mending service. We would rather patch a garment than sell you a new one.

settings.title: Numbered, then archived
settings.body: Each release carries a run number. Once it sells out, it is retired — recorded in the archive, never reprinted.

settings.title: The first stitch
settings.body: ARCHIVES opens as a two-person studio in a converted Shibuya printworks.

settings.title: First numbered run
settings.body: Run No. 001 — twelve field jackets, hand-numbered and sold directly to twelve people.

settings.title: Repair program launches
settings.body: Every garment sold from this point ships with a lifetime repair guarantee.

settings.title: The Tokyo flagship
settings.body: A single-room store opens beside the original workshop — no stockroom, just the current archive.

settings.title: Forty releases in
settings.body: The archive passes its fortieth numbered release, each one still traceable back to its maker.

settings.name: Japanese selvedge denim
settings.body: Woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, finished with natural indigo that fades unevenly, honestly, over years of wear.

settings.name: Heavyweight organic cotton
settings.body: Grown without pesticides and loop-knitted at a mid-weight mill we have worked with since our first collection.

settings.name: Recycled technical shell
settings.body: A weatherproof shell rebuilt from post-industrial nylon waste — quiet hardware, taped seams, no branding.

settings.title: Materials first
settings.body: Heavyweight organic cottons, technical outerwear fabrics, and quiet hardware — chosen to last, not to trend.

settings.title: Made to repair
settings.body: Every piece ships with a repair guide. We would rather mend a seam than sell you a replacement.

settings.title: Small, numbered runs
settings.body: Releases are produced in limited batches and archived once sold — nothing is restocked indefinitely.
